final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for an original, non-infringing fragrance brand named "染秋 (RAN QIU)".

Style/medium: needs an East-Asian ink-and-dye craft aesthetic rooted in traditional "染" artistry — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand standards layout showing primary colors, secondary colors, and typography specimens in clearly divided sections
Subject: must include the brand identity system for "染秋 (RAN QIU)":
  Brand concept: 东方哲学 / 自然更迭 / 秋日诗意 / 染的工艺美学
  Core ingredients: 桂花 / 柿子 / 枫叶 / 乌龙茶 / 肉桂 / 檀香 / 琥珀
  Core fragrance lines: 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Scene/backdrop: needs a refined brand-sheet backdrop evoking autumn warmth and Eastern restraint — exact surface treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic, quietly melancholic autumn atmosphere — exact mood rendering is yours
Color palette: must show a primary color group and a secondary color group derived from autumn's natural palette (桂花 gold, 柿子 amber-orange, 枫叶 deep red, 乌龙茶 brown, 琥珀 resin gold, 檀香 pale wood) — exact hex values, swatches, and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a texture language referencing handcrafted dye fabric, washi paper, or ink wash — exact material expression is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" and "RAN QIU" as the primary wordmark; must include section labels for 主色 / 辅色 / 字体规范; must include the three fragrance line names 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色 as specimen text
Constraints: must preserve the dual-script identity (Chinese + Latin romanization) throughout; layout must clearly distinguish 主色 section, 辅色 section, and 字体规范 section
Avoid: overly Western minimalism that erases the Eastern dye-craft identity; neon or cold-toned colors inconsistent with autumn warmth
